channel.title: Writing a Unix Shell in C Without AI — Learning the Hard Way
channel.description: Notes from building low-level systems software the slow way: man pages, gdb, valgrind, and mistakes.

item.title: Building a Unix Shell in C Without AI — Learning the Hard Way
item.description: Phase 1: command loop, built-ins, PATH search, fork/exec, the strtok() trap, and debugging with GDB/Valgrind.
